title: MT 1 (Remotely Proctored)
description:
You have 70 minutes to complete this exam.

You may ONLY use the spreadsheet provided for this exam, and 1, single-sided 8.5"x11" study sheet.

The spreadsheet is available in a separate prompt.  You must upload your spreadsheet. File Name = First.Last_MT1.xlsx

Your spreadsheet is worth 3 points.

Any other assistance, (other than asking Professor Burnes a clarifying question) is NOT ALLOWED. The use of other assistance is a violation of the CU Boulder Honor Code.  Offering assistance to another student is a violation of the CU Boulder Honor Code.

ESBM4570_MT1.xlsx Download ESBM4570_MT1.xlsx

questions.text:
Look at IS1.
Briefly explain the Depreciation assumption for Year 2.
Why would this assumption make sense?

2 colleagues have an idea for a small business.  They are planning on retiring from successful careers with the "Big 4 Accounting Firms", and then doing some consulting to keep market contacts and earn a little money along the way.  They don't plan on needing any additional funding, and will have limited tax liabilities associated with the income from this venture. When they are done with this 'lifestyle', they will just 'close the door' (eg take down their Open sign).
Based on this, which of the following business structures would you recommend to these colleagues turning small business founders.
